chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD CP. No. S- 206 of 2016 DATED ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 26.01.2018 For katcha peshi For hearing of MA 2337/16 Mr. Bashir Ahmed Almani, advocate for petitioner Learned counsel for petitioner states that the petitioner has expired and that he does not wish to press this petition any further. Accordingly the same is dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE karar_hussain /PS*
